TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241559. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 7 side b of tape: A mixture of songs (with brief introductions) to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) I Want to Love Him; 2) Lost Him; 3) Painful Being Single; 4) Song for Food and Wine; 5) Pitiful Friend. Recorded in Nov 1965.
